name: organize-folders
description: Folder and drive organization workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Plan safe folder and drive organization.
interface.longDescription: Organize Folders helps Codex scan folders and drives, diagnose clutter, design maintainable directory structures, generate migration plans, and document archive rules while defaulting to read-only safety.
defaultPrompt: Scan my Downloads folder and suggest archive paths.
Create a dry-run migration plan for this drive.
